lines: prodyattejombujākṣaṃ hṛdaya bhaja sadā tvaṃ vapuḥ prāṃśu jiṣṇoḥ |
vākyaṃ te kathitam idaṃ hitaṃ nṛpāṇām |
tat sarvaṃ saha sacivair vimṛśya buddhayā @
kva vāsudevaḥ kva ca gopakas tathā @
kuto nu vīro yudhi sātyakiḥ kila ||
mune samarthāḥ khalu bhadram astu te ||
bhuṅkte ya eko vibhur jagato viśvam agryaṃ @
ya eko yāti jagatāṃ viśvam īśo @
sa māṃ juṣyāt sukṛtī śreyase saḥ ||
prasūtir ubhayor na prasūtiś ca sūkṣmaḥ @
sa mām īśaḥ pātu viśvasya dhātā ||
brahmā putraiḥ sahitaś ca dvijāś ca |
dhṛtir bhūtir yaś ca guhā śrutiś ca |
bhagāṅkaṃ yat tad dhy umā sarvadhātrī |
yal liṅgāṅkaṃ yac ca loke bhagāṅkaṃ @
sarvaṃ somas tvaṃ tryambakaḥ sarvam īśa |
rudro devas tvaṃ rudanād rāvaṇāc ca @
tasmād dhi tvām īśvaraṃ prāhur īśaṃ @
tasmāt tvām āhur bhava ity eva bhūtaṃ @
kaṇṭhe nailyaṃ tena te yat pravṛttaṃ @
yal liṅgāṅkaṃ yac ca loke bhagāṅkaṃ @
sarvaṃ soma tvaṃ sthāvaraṃ jaṅgamaṃ ca |
vedair gītā sā hi tattvaṃ prasūtā @
patiś ca me syāt sumukho matpratīkṣo @
nityaṃ madbhaktaḥ syāmn manmatir madgatiś ca |
manovirāgo na bhavet sādhu ca syāt ||
smareyur me niścayaṃ ca vrataṃ ca ||
diśaḥ sarvā daśa cātmā ca me 'yam |
santv ete vai sākṣiṇaḥ sarva eva @
satatam iha hi yaḥ paṭhen naraḥ @
tāṃ revatīṃ cāpy atha vāpi rāmaṃ @
gadaś ca dhīmān atha sāraṇaś ca @
madhyaṃ ca gatvā sa cukūrda bhūyo @
pārthaṃ subhadrāṃ ca balaṃ ca devam |
sa cāpi satyām atha rukmiṇīṃ ca @
bhaimā hi te tatyajur eva toyam ||
peyaiś ca dadhnā payasā ca vīrāḥ @
sarpiḥ palaṃ madhu palaṃ maricaṃ dvikarṣaṃ @
viveda kṛṣṇaś ca sa nāradaś ca @
jñātuṃ hi śakyaṃ hi mahāgirir vā @
tataḥ paraṃ kiṃ sukham asti loke ||
nṛpaḥ kuśāgraiḥ punar eva yaś ca @
āyuś ca vaṃśe nahuṣaś ca yasya @
babhūva rājā ca vasuś ca yasya @
pātā ca hartā ca hariḥ sa eva |
bhuvaś ca kartā harir eka eva |
pādau ca vikṣipya karau ca dhūnvan ||
draṣṭuṃ tam īśaṃ vayam udyatāḥ smaḥ ||
draṣṭuṃ tam īśaṃ vayam udyatāḥ smaḥ ||
draṣṭuṃ tam īśaṃ vayam udyatāḥ smaḥ ||
baliṃ balād eṣa hariḥ sa vāmanaḥ @
sa eṣa sākṣād iha mām avasthitaḥ ||
hayaiś ca nāgaiś ca rathaiś ca nirgatam ||
danoḥ sutāṃ tām avasat sukhaṃ hariḥ ||
gopāṃś ca gopīś ca sagokulaṃ hariḥ ||
śete sma rātrau sukham eva keśavaḥ |
hatvā tam ugraṃ rajakaṃ balāt pathi |
tāṃ cāpi vīkṣan bahuśas tadā śivaḥ ||
tad atra duḥkhāya hi kevalaṃ naḥ |
tejomayaṃ mama harer vapur astu bhūtyai ||
piban pibaṃs tasya vapuḥ punaḥ punaḥ |
puṇyaṃ pavitram atha pāpaharaṃ śivaṃ ca |
tulyaṃ phalaṃ bhavati tasya ca tasya caiva ||
yat satyaṃ yad amṛtam ādim akṣaraṃ vai @
yad bhūtaṃ bhavati mithaś ca yad bhaviṣyam |
kriyā makhān atha kṛtavān girīṃś ca saḥ ||
nanāda bhūyo 'pi tato balāt sa tam |
grahāś ca yāgāś ca mahī nabhaś ca |
rajaś ca sattvaṃ ca tamo damaś ca ||
viśve ca devā vasavaś ca sarve |
krodhaś ca kāmaś ca tathaiva harṣo @
darpaś ca mohaḥ pitaraś ca sarve ||
ity evam uktvā sa ca daityarājaṃ @
mahī ca lokaś ca śasī nabhaś ca @
grahāś ca sūryaś ca diśaś ca sarvāḥ |
nadyaś ca śailāś ca mahārṇavāś ca @
parāṃ ca siddhiṃ paramaṃ ca devaṃ @
paraṃ ca mantraṃ paramaṃ tapaś ca |
paraṃ ca dharmaṃ paramaṃ yaśaś ca @
paraṃ ca satyaṃ paramaṃ haviś ca @
paraṃ ca yajñaṃ paramaṃ ca hotraṃ @
paraṃ ca yogaṃ paramām ca vāṇīm |
tvām āhur agryaṃ munayaś ca sarve ||
paraṃ paraṃ cāpi paraṃ ca mokṣaṃ |
paraṃ ca guptaṃ paramaṃ ca mantram |
paraṃ ca mantram paramaṃ ca mantram |
paraṃ ca guhyaṃ paramaṃ ca mantram |
divyāś ca khaḍgā viśikhāś ca dīptā @
sa tatra vastrāṇi śubhāś ca gāvaḥ @
dīptām amoghāṃ ca sa śaktim ugrām |
viśve ca devā marutaś ca sarve @
manoḥ sutā vai vasavaś ca sarve @
khaḍgāṃś ca te vajramukhāś ca śaktīḥ ||
śūlāṃś ca vṛkṣāṃś ca vigṛhya dīptān @
khaḍgāś ca khaḍgaiḥ samam āhatā nṛpa |
na hy antarikṣaṃ na diśo na bhūmir @
dvijāś ca mukhyāḥ paśavaś ca maṅgalāḥ ||
natāḥ sma taṃ jagatāṃ patim ādibhūtam ||
loke sajjanaṣaṭpadair ahar ahaḥ pepīyamānaṃ mudā @
kṛṣṇāt paraṃ kim api tattvam ahaṃ na jāne ||

prose_sample: || kecit tu saṃkhyākathanābhāvāt samatāniyamena daśasahasraślokasamāptiḥ pāraṇam *||
|| kecit tu mahābhāratasya ekāvṛttir ekapāraṇam iti ca *||
